findings.reason: control C-BO-01 references version '2016-CDD'; requirement R-BENEF-OWN is now version '2018-CDD' (procedure steps may be obsolete)
findings.recommendation: Update C-BO-01 to reference requirement version '2018-CDD' and confirm the procedure steps still align.

findings.reason: control C-CTR-01 reporting threshold 15000 > required maximum 10000 (requirement R-CTR-THRESH)
findings.recommendation: Reconcile C-CTR-01 to satisfy the R-CTR-THRESH bound; route the wording change to the policy owner.

findings.reason: no active policy/procedure control maps to in-effect requirement R-GEO-EDD

evidence.obligation: Apply enhanced monitoring to customers in higher-risk geographies.

findings.recommendation: Draft or adopt a policy/procedure covering R-GEO-EDD; assign an owner and target date. Recommendation only, for human adjudication.

findings.reason: requirement R-INDEP-TEST expects retained evidence but mapped control(s) record none
findings.recommendation: Establish and record the evidence artifact demonstrating C-TEST-01 operates as required by R-INDEP-TEST.

findings.reason: control C-SAR-01 retains 3.0y < required minimum 5.0y (requirement R-SAR-RETAIN)
findings.recommendation: Reconcile C-SAR-01 to satisfy the R-SAR-RETAIN bound; route the wording change to the policy owner.

findings.reason: no active policy/procedure control maps to in-effect requirement R-TRAIN

evidence.obligation: Provide ongoing AML training to relevant personnel.

findings.recommendation: Draft or adopt a policy/procedure covering R-TRAIN; assign an owner and target date. Recommendation only, for human adjudication.

findings.reason: control C-BO-01 last reviewed 2024-01-01 (926d ago), exceeds the 365-day review cycle
findings.recommendation: Schedule a review of C-BO-01; last reviewed 2024-01-01 exceeds the 365-day cycle.

disclaimer: Gap-analysis findings and recommendations only; not a compliance determination, attestation, or filing. Human adjudication required.
narrative: Gap analysis of the US BSA/AML program as of 2026-07-15 identified 7 findings across 7 in-effect requirements: 3 High, 3 Medium, 1 Low. High-severity items are two parameter conflicts (the CTR policy threshold of 15,000 exceeds the required 10,000 maximum; SAR retention of 3 years is below the required 5-year minimum) and one coverage gap (no active control maps to the AML training requirement; the only mapped control is retired). Medium items cover a version-drift on the beneficial-ownership control, an evidence gap on independent testing, and a coverage gap on higher-risk-geography monitoring (guidance-level). One Low item flags a stale review on the beneficial-ownership control. R-CIP is covered with no finding; a pending rule is not yet in effect. Each finding cites its requirement and/or control and carries a remediation recommendation for the policy owner to weigh. Gap-analysis findings and recommendations only; not a compliance determination, attestation, or filing. Human adjudication required.
